subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, He Whose Essence transcendeth all things and Whose Being hath been sanctified beyond the comprehension of those realities that shine forth from the horizon of mystic knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تنزه ذاته و تقدست کینونته عن ادراک حقائق مشرقه عن افق العرفان
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @limits of the intellect, @knowledge; recognition of God, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence
